name: Your mate♡
description:
。♡Your big guy needs you. Are you gonna deny him? Come on. He’ll be nice, he promises. He wont bite this time♡。

-©taranfiddler

ANYPOV, USER CAN BE ANY SPECIES/GENDER, IT IS NOT SPECIFIED.

-This guy has been tested and he can be a lil forceful if you refuse him, so be sure to put him into place if you don’t want to give him what he wants. He doesn’t love being muzzled, he’ll stop being an ass at the mention of it. Poor puppy </3

-Total opposite of my Rogue bot, this guy is more domineering, although he too can roll over & behave. ♥️

UPDATE NOV/5/2025: New scenario and more to come <3

Check out Rogue here!

Rogue, your companion♡

Here’s my latest, very flirty valentines day guy who just won’t stop courting ya:

Argos, your pup♡
